---
title: "Take-Problems Week #1"
format: html
embed-resources: true
toc: true
---

This is an example of turning in an assignment. 

# Problem 1

When I checked the index of PeacoQC, I saw the following:

![](images/Placeholder.png)

I found the following functions ....

# Problem 2

Bioconductor has #xyz of cytometry packages

FulanoDeTal contributed the greatest number of individual cytometry packages, with xyz

And I would want to try tidyflowCore, CATALYST and .... for the following reasons. 

# Problem 3

I installed broom, cytoMEM, and CytoExploreR, seeing the following differences vs regular way....
